function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT d.Fiscal Year,
       SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS total_revenue,
       SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS total_cost,
       SUM(s.Extended Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS gross_profit,
       (SUM(s.Extended Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost)) / SUM(s.Extended Amount) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct,
       COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_order_lines
FROM Sales s
JOIN Date d ON s.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
GROUP BY d.Fiscal Year
ORDER BY d.Fiscal Year ASC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT
    Channel,
    SUM(Sales Amount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(Sales Amount) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(Sales Amount) FROM Sales) AS revenue_share_pct,
    COUNT(DISTINCT SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_orders,
    COUNT(*) AS order_lines,
    AVG(Sales Amount) AS avg_line_amount,
    AVG((Sales Amount - Total Product Cost) / Sales Amount) AS gross_margin_pct
FROM Sales
JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales.SalesOrderLineKey = Sales_Order.SalesOrderLineKey
GROUP BY Channel
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;"}

Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT
    r.Business Type AS Business_Type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.ResellerKey) AS reseller_count,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT r.ResellerKey) AS revenue_per_reseller,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount - s.Total Product Cost) AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s.Sales Amount - s.Total Product Cost) / SUM(s.Sales Amount)) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM Sales s
JOIN Reseller r ON s.ResellerKey = r.ResellerKey
WHERE s.Channel = 'Reseller'
GROUP BY r.Business Type
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT 
    p.Subcategory,
    COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS order_lines,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS revenue,
    SUM(s.Order Quantity) AS units_sold,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) / NULLIF(SUM(s.Order Quantity), 0) AS revenue_per_unit,
    AVG(pr.List Price) AS avg_list_price,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s.Sales Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost)) / NULLIF(SUM(s.Sales Amount), 0) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM Sales s
JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
JOIN Product pr ON pr.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY p.Subcategory
ORDER BY revenue DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT
    so.Channel,
    p.Category,
    d.Fiscal Year AS prior_year,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount) AS prior_revenue,

questionText: Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. questionLabel: [Q21][hard] Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT
    so.Channel,
    p.Category,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s.Order Quantity) AS units_sold,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) / NULLIF(SUM(s.Order Quantity), 0) AS revenue_per_unit,
    AVG(p.List Price) AS avg_list_price,
    (1 - SUM(s.Unit Price) / NULLIF(AVG(p.List Price), 0)) * 100 AS realized_discount_pct,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s.Sales Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost)) / NULLIF(SUM(s.Extended Amount), 0) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM Sales s
JOIN Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY so.Channel, p.Category
ORDER BY so.Channel ASC, total_revenue DESC;"}

questionLabel: [Q23][hard] For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH subcategory_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        p.Category,
        p.Subcategory,
        SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS revenue,
        SUM(s.Order Quantity) AS units_sold,
        SUM(s.Sales Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS gross_profit
    FROM Sales s
    JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
    GROUP BY p.Category, p.Subcategory
), ranked AS (
    SELECT
        Category,
        Subcategory,
        revenue,
        units_sold,
        gross_profit,
        SUM(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY Category) AS category_total_revenue,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Category ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM subcategory_metrics
)
SELECT
    Category,
    revenue_rank,
    Subcategory,
    revenue,
    units_sold,
    gross_profit,
    ROUND(100.0 * revenue / category_total_revenue, 2) AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY Category ASC, revenue_rank ASC, Subcategory ASC;
"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH channel_agg AS (
    SELECT
        so.Channel,
        p.Category,
        SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS revenue,
        SUM(s.Sales Amount) AS gross_profit,
        COUNT(DISTINCT so.SalesOrderLineKey) AS orders
    FROM Sales s
    JOIN Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
    JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
    GROUP BY so.Channel, p.Category
),
channel_totals AS (
    SELECT
        Channel,
        SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
    FROM channel_agg
    GROUP BY Channel
),
cumulative AS (
    SELECT
        ca.Channel,
        ca.Category,
        ca.revenue,
        ca.gross_profit,
        ca.orders,
        ca.revenue / ct.total_revenue * 100.0 AS channel_revenue_share_pct,
        SUM(ca.revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY ca.Channel ORDER BY ca.revenue DESC) / ct.total_revenue * 100.0 AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,
        ct.total_revenue
    FROM channel_agg ca
    JOIN channel_totals ct ON ca.Channel = ct.Channel
)
SELECT
    Channel,
    Category,
    revenue,
    ROUND(channel_revenue_share_pct, 2) AS channel_revenue_share_pct,
    ROUND(cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, 2) AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,
    orders,
    gross_profit
FROM cumulative
ORDER BY Channel ASC, revenue DESC, Category ASC;"}
